data.id: TR-PICUS-DISCOVERY-002: Active Directory Reconnaissance Tools (BloodHound, PowerView, AdFind, Ping Castle)
data.name: TR-PICUS-DISCOVERY-002: Active Directory Reconnaissance Tools (BloodHound, PowerView, AdFind, Ping Castle)
data.description: Detects execution of Active Directory enumeration and reconnaissance tools including BloodHound, PowerView, AdFind (adfind.exe), PingCastle, and Adalanche. These tools are commonly used in post-compromise AD reconnaissance. Legitimate administrators rarely execute these tools from user context. MITRE T1087.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'adfind.exe' OR process.name contains 'sharphound' OR process.name contains 'bloodhound' OR process.name contains 'pingcastle' OR process.name contains 'adalanche') OR (process.command_line contains 'Invoke-BloodHound' OR process.command_line contains 'Get-ADUser' AND process.command_line contains 'Filter' OR process.command_line contains 'sqlceip' AND process.parent.name contains 'cmd')
